case_title: BARBAJIDE R. ODEBOJU VS. GEICO CASUALTY CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ODEBOJU, BARBAJIDE R. AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY CO.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,044.26 FILED BY ODEBOJU, BARBAJIDE R. AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY CO.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ODEBOJU, BARBAJIDE R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
